description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events to the master branch. The workflow should have three jobs: build, cppcheck, and crossbuild, each running on ubuntu-latest. The build job should use a matrix strategy to compile with both clang and gcc, and install dependencies, checkout code, and run a custom script. The cppcheck job should install cppcheck, checkout code, and run a custom script. The crossbuild job should install mingw-w64, checkout code, cross-build with a custom toolchain, and upload the resulting artifacts.
